[Skip to content](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/#content)

# Alina Residence

## Boca Raton’s Most Desirable Address is Now Move-In Ready

We invite you to discover ALINA 210 and ALINA 220, the final two towers within [downtown Boca Raton’s most thoughtfully conceived](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/location/) new private community. Tucked on nine lushly landscaped acres between the manicured fairways of the Boca Raton Resort & Club and Southeast Mizner Boulevard, ALINA is an oasis of tranquility enlivened by an extraordinary array of resort-inspired amenities.

[Explore Alina 220](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/residences-all/#220)

[Explore Alina 210](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/residences-all/#210)

[Explore The Penthouses](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/residences-all/#penthouses)

## Exquisitely Designed Residences

##### SPACIOUS & LIGHT-FILLED

ALINA’s residences celebrate seamless indoor-outdoor living with select units showcasing panoramic views of Boca Raton Resort & Club, downtown Boca Raton, and the Atlantic Ocean.

[Explore The residences](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/residences-all/)

![ALINA 220 Rooftop Pool](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Alina-220-Pool-1-scaled.jpg)

## Resort-Inspired Lifestyle

##### EXTENSIVE AMENITIES & HOSPITALITY-STYLE SERVICES

ALINA’s collection of resort-inspired indoor and outdoor amenities has been thoughtfully curated with a focus on wellness and hospitality-trained staff provide services around the clock.

[Explore The Amenities](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/amenities-and-services/)

## Downtown Boca Raton

##### SHOPPING, DINING & CULTURE STEPS AWAY

World-class cultural and culinary destinations, luxury shopping boutiques, and live entertainment are just steps away via a park-style pedestrian streetscape featuring sculpture installations curated from the nearby Boca Raton Museum of Art.

[Explore The Location](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/location/)

![ALINA Residences lifestyle outdoor amenities](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/alinabocaraton.com-lifestyle-22.2000x0.jpg)

![Private Villas Boca Raton](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/4S1A4772-MLS.jpg)

## A Private Nine-Acre Community

##### FORMAL ENTRANCE ON MIZNER BOULEVARD

Just beyond the dramatic glass canopies and water features of the formal entrance, ALINA’s residents enjoy meticulously landscaped grounds by award-winning landscape architecture firm EDSA.

[Explore services](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/amenities-and-services/#services)

[Close](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/#)

![](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Screenshot-2026-01-07-at-1.59.09-PM-1024x971.png)

[Close](https://www.alinabocaraton.com/#)

web.description: Alina Residences offers gorgeous new villas, penthouses and condos in Boca Raton. Browse our website to explore your options and find your dream home today.

## ALINA Residences Boca Raton

**Luxury Living Redefined**

ALINA Residences features thoughtfully conceived condos, villas and penthouses in the heart of Boca Raton. Explore all that this nine-story luxury high rise has to offer—and find your dream home today.

[Discover Alina](https://www.alinacondo.com/en/property/)

![](https://www.alinacondo.com/data/public/rotator/1.jpg)

## Slide 1

![](https://www.alinacondo.com/data/public/rotator/2_15e9072c4cbe19.jpg)

## Slide 2

![](https://www.alinacondo.com/data/public/rotator/3_15e9072ee72aac.jpg)

## Slide 3

## A CURATED LIFESTYLE

Residents of ALINA become part of Boca Raton’s energetic and emerging downtown, an upscale scene brimming with world-class dining, luxury shopping, cultural attractions and much more.

[Residences](https://www.alinacondo.com/en/property/) [More](https://www.alinacondo.com/en/property/)

## ALINA Residences

Set amid a 9-acre slice of tropical paradise, ALINA’s contemporary collection of artful residences offers views of downtown, as well as of the famed golf course at the Boca Raton Resort & Club.

The Penthouses at ALINA raise the luxury residential bar in every way imaginable with sprawling living spaces, artfully rendered design details, state-of-the-art gourmet kitchens, cutting-edge home technology—and incomparable views of Boca Raton
